problem id: c27fd09b
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(1) AND NOT SHL(5)

examples:
  11101101 -> 01011011
  00111011 -> 00010110
  10111110 -> 00111101
  00111001 -> 01010010
  01110010 -> 10100100
  01101011 -> 10010110
  00110011 -> 00000110
  10101110 -> 00011101
  11110111 -> 00001111
  00100110 -> 00001100

query: 11110010
predicted answer: 10100101
